q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) on line 97, a filesystem write operation that is an irreversible side effect

mock_guidance.target: Mock pathlib.Path.parent.mkdir or the Path object used in target.parent.mkdir on line 97
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the full path string passed to mkdir, specifically checking whether it escapes BASE_EXPORT_DIR via traversal sequences like ../ in the user-controlled name parameter
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Make the mocked mkdir behave as a no-op (return None) without actually creating directories, allowing execution to continue to the return statement
notes: The return value {'stored': str(target), 'bytes': len(body)} can still be inspected after the mock to verify the injected path appears in the stored key
Ensure the mock is scoped to the Path instance derived from BASE_EXPORT_DIR / name to avoid affecting unrelated filesystem calls
